metadata.description: Local marketplace for the agent-bridge Claude Code plugin — MCP tools + channel for cross-machine agent-to-agent communication.

plugins.name: agent-bridge
plugins.description: Bridge AI coding agents across machines via SSH. Exposes bridge_send_message / bridge_receive_messages / bridge_run_command MCP tools AND pushes incoming messages from other machines into the running session as <channel source="agent-bridge"> events.
